emails.subject: Aspect Contracts
emails.body: Aspect Contracts Attached are the two contracts which will replace the single original, as we discussed. Please review and let me know if you have any questions. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Aspect Contracts
emails.body: RE: Aspect Contracts Gerald, a couple of comments... 1) Pricing does not change until 1/102, nor do other provisions like the keep whole, The way you have the contracts drafted, it is as if we have new terms beginning now. I think the producers will object to this and think we are trying to put something over on them now. Can we make the new contracts effective 1/1/02? 2) Under Art. 2 Contract price....I have a questions about the 80% of "First of the Month Nomination"...what about the 5% swing they get...Shouldn't it be 80% of actuals, subject to the keep whole? Maybe I am the one confused, but could you please call me to discuss. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Aspect Contracts
emails.body: Another comment...on the Cross Media contract, you need to add Esenjay on the signature page. Also, sometimes on the exhibits, you list Helmerich Payne as "H&P" or "Helmerich"...you may want to make consistent. Thanks
